articles.title: GET THE WORLD'S FASTEST WHISPER INFERENCE WITH BASETEN
articles.summary: Baseten's model performance engineers have built the world's fastest inference engine for Whisper, the best open-source audio transcription (speech-to-text) AI model.

articles.title: Get the world's best Whisper inference with Baseten
CHATGPT SEARCH
articles.summary: ChatGPT can now search the web in a much better way than before. You can get fast, timely answers with links to relevant web sources, which you would have previously needed to go to a search engine for. This blends the benefits of a natural language interface with the value of up-to-date sports scores, news, stock quotes, and more.

articles.title: META FAIR ROBOTICS IMPROVEMENTS
articles.summary: This work includes several artifacts such as vision based tactical sensing, new hardware based touch sensors, and some interesting strategic partnerships in robotics.

articles.title: ELON MUSK'S XAI ADDS IMAGE UNDERSTANDING CAPABILITIES TO GROK
articles.summary: xAI has enhanced its Grok AI model with image-understanding capabilities for paid users on X. The update allows users to upload images and query the AI about them. Future updates may include document understanding capabilities.

articles.title: A BENCHMARK FOR REINFORCEMENT LEARNING
articles.summary: ODRL is the first standardized benchmark for evaluating reinforcement learning methods in environments with mismatched dynamics.

articles.title: TEXT-TO-IMAGE MODEL TO GENERATE MEMES
articles.summary: Researchers have developed a novel adapter method for text-to-image models, allowing them to handle intricate tasks like meme video generation while maintaining the base model's generalization strengths.

articles.title: ANOMALY CLASSIFICATION IN INDUSTRY
articles.summary: AnomalyNCD is a multi-class anomaly classification framework designed to complement traditional anomaly detection methods in industrial settings.

articles.title: ARCJET: AI SECURITY AS CODE
articles.summary: Bot protection, user limits, PII detection, attack prevention. A developer-first approach to security.

articles.title: MRT5: DYNAMIC TOKEN MERGING FOR EFFICIENT BYTE-LEVEL LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Byte Level language models are a step towards a token free future. However, the sequence length issue is a huge challenge. Merge tokens dynamically to improve the number of tokens in context.

articles.title: ACCELERATED BART
articles.summary: A new GPU-enabled implementation of Bayesian Additive Regression Trees (BART) that dramatically boosts its processing speed, making it up to 200 times faster than traditional CPU-based versions.

articles.title: HUGE NEW DIFFUSERS RELEASE (GITHUB PAGE)
articles.summary: New pipelines (Flux, Stable Audio, Kolors, CogVideoX, Latte, and more), methods (FreeNoise and SparseCtrl), and refactors for the Hugging Face Diffusers package.

articles.title: HOW TO TRAIN LLM AS A JUDGE TO DRIVE BUSINESS VALUE
articles.summary: LLM As a Judge is a way to use an existing language model to rank and score natural language. This post outlines how to best do this to process or evaluate data.

articles.title: EXPLORE CULTURE WITH GOOGLE'S VOICE AI MODELS
articles.summary: Users can explore culture in unique ways using Google's voice AI models. Projects include Talking Tours with AI-guided virtual tours, Mice in the Museum for art narration, and Lip Sync, where animated lips discuss cultural topics. These fun tools offer fresh perspectives on art and design.

articles.title: OPENAI CFO SAYS 75% OF ITS REVENUE COMES FROM PAYING CONSUMERS
articles.summary: OpenAI's revenue is primarily from consumer subscriptions, with 75% generated from paid ChatGPT users. Despite efforts to attract corporate customers, the consumer side remains strong with ChatGPT reaching 250 million weekly active users. OpenAI recently secured $6.6 billion in funding to support AI advancement and is advocating for significant data center expansion.

articles.title: CALLING AI USERS! WRITE A G2 REVIEW FOR A $10 AMAZON GIFT CARD
articles.summary: There are thousands of AI tools on G2. Find one you're using, share your experience to help future users, and get a $10 gift card for your

articles.title: thoughts. Write a review
HELLO PATIENT (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Hello Patient has launched out of stealth with a $6.3m seed round led by 8VC.

articles.title: GOOGLE PLANS TO ANNOUNCE ITS NEXT GEMINI MODEL SOON
articles.summary: OpenAI is planning to debut a successor to GPT-4 and Google plans to launch Gemini 2.0 in December.

articles.title: META IS REPORTEDLY DEVELOPING A SEARCH ENGINE FOR ITS CHATBOT
articles.summary: Meta is developing a search engine for its chatbot to reduce reliance on Google and Microsoft.

articles.title: A MYSTERIOUS NEW IMAGE GENERATION MODEL HAS APPEARED
articles.summary: red_panda, a new image generation model, outperforms models from Midjourney, Black Forest Labs, and OpenAI on the Artificial Analysis benchmark.
